projectIntent: Template live catalog for a prompt-driven consumer workspace. Replace campaigns, issues, and source context before real execution.

campaigns.name: template-discovery
campaigns.objective: Capture the first structured batch of records and normalize them into canonical state.

campaigns.name: template-execution
campaigns.objective: Prepare and execute the next best action for the highest-value record.

campaigns.name: template-follow-up
campaigns.objective: Track contacts, follow-up timing, and memory-linked notes after the first execution.

issues.task: Capture the first batch of records and assign one next best action per item.
issues.nextBestAction: Use the structured batch to unlock the first execution-ready issue.

issues.task: Prepare the first execution package from the best structured record.
issues.nextBestAction: Promote this issue after the discovery batch is captured and ranked.

issues.task: Execute the prepared package and preserve evidence or blocking state.
issues.nextBestAction: Claim this issue when the execution package is ready.

issues.task: Capture the follow-up state, contact context, and next timing after execution.
issues.nextBestAction: Promote this issue when the first execution result exists.
